name: Failed Logon Activity Monitoring
description: McAfee detection for failed domain user logon attempts due to invalid passwords and successful logons following multiple failed attempts helps identify potential brute force attacks or unauthorized access attempts. These rules aid in monitoring account security and detecting suspicious authentication patterns.

filterSets.name: Windows Security Auditing - Domain User Failed Logon Due To Invalid Password
Windows Security Auditing - Domain User Logon After Multiple Failed Attempts

author: Mark Chester De Quiroz
